description: A generic-first ORM for Go with explicit schemas, typed queries, relations, migrations, and extensible drivers.
rules: Use db.Use[T]() for model queries and Go field names.
Use db.Table(name) for table queries and database column names.
Define schemas with Define instead of struct tags.
Use oro.Map for explicit writes so zero values are not guessed.
Use oro.Field, oro.Time, and oro.JSON for composable typed conditions.
Times are stored in UTC and read back in Config.Location.
Do not import SQL drivers in Oro; applications choose and import concrete database drivers.
